Verify number on next run by searching open issues; prior two attempts in runs 26284286573 and 26284971633 did not materialize. Track checked-off items in checked_off_actions.

commands.format: uv run ruff check --fix && uv run ruff format
commands.notes: Python >=3.13.1,<3.14 required. Agent env has Python 3.14.5 — uv sync fails. Standalone ruff (pip --user) works fine for lint/format validation. Use `ruff format --check <file>` to verify formatting on a single file without rewriting.

perf_improver_prs.title_prefix_expected: [perf-improver] perf: pre-compile regex patterns in verify_resident_identity
perf_improver_prs.summary: Hoisted 11 regex patterns in verify_resident_identity.py to module-level re.compile(). ~2.6x speedup on normalize_unit_number, ~2.2x on extract_birth_year. Parity verified across 60 cases. v2 sibling already uses this pattern.

repo_snapshot.note: Major code drop landed between runs. Python 3.13-only agent-leasing FastAPI + OpenAI Agents SDK service. ~168 .py files in src/, ~216 in tests/. AGENTS.md is the canonical guide.

perf_opportunities_backlog.note: _NORMALIZERS lambda wrappers can be direct function refs
resolve_greeting_placeholders: 3 sequential .replace() — consider single str.translate or regex
sanitize_urls loops str.replace per URL — O(N×len) on growing string
